## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — dependency / tooling
- [ ] docs — documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
